name: NCR Atleos Corp
summary: General General Development of the Business NCR Atleos Corporation (Atleos, the Company, we, us, and our) is an industry-leading financial technology company providing self-directed banking solutions to a global customer base including financial institutions, merchants, manufacturers, retailers and consumers.
